TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O sakero no 'Amis Sakero hananay no 'Amis ko kero, ira ko malikoda ato misalokiyaw hananay a kero. O malikoda hananay a kero i, o kero i kiloma'an anca o kero no fa'inayan. O misakoliyaw hananay a kero i, o kero to anohacowa sapikeroaw, kaacangan, pipakay'ifan, o piingkayan to malasofitay a fa'inayan; o kero no fafahiyan sanay ko roma a ngangan nira. Nga'ayay minanam a makero ko fafahiyan to kero no likoda, kaorira, cowa pinanam ko fa'inayan to kero no misakoliyway. O kero no 'Amis, ira ko kero cowa kaeca awa ko radiw. O matengilay a radiw to "mihamhamay to lafang", "kadofah" hananay a kero i, o niharatengan ato nipangangan no aniniay a tamdaw kora. O kalalecad ato cowa kalecad no kero i, o radiw kora sakaeca a lalecad naira, o radiw i, iraay to ko sakakero nira a kero. Pi'arawan to lakaw .
S.PHON: o~u sak…ôro~u no~u °amis sak…ôro~u ńßananaj no~u °amis ko~u k…ôro~u, ira ko~u ma…ĺiko~u…¨~…ģa ato~u misa…ĺo~ukijaw ńßananaj a k…ôro~u. o~u ma…ĺiko~u…¨~…ģa ńßananaj a k…ôro~u i, o~u k…ôro~u i ki…ĺo~uma °an an ¶a o~u k…ôro~u no~u fa °inajan. o~u misako~u…ĺijaw ńßananaj a k…ôro~u i, o~u k…ôro~u to~u ano~uńßa ¶o~uwa sapik…ôro~uaw, kaa ¶aŇčan, pipakaj °ifan, o~u piiŇčkajan to~u ma…ĺaso~ufitaj a fa °inajan; o~u k…ôro~u no~u fafańßijan sanaj ko~u ro~uma a ŇčaŇčan nira. Ňča °ajaj minanam a mak…ôro~u ko~u fafańßijan to~u k…ôro~u no~u …ĺiko~u…¨~…ģa, kao~urira, ¶o~uwa pinanam ko~u fa °inajan to~u k…ôro~u no~u misako~u…ĺijwaj. o~u k…ôro~u no~u °amis, ira ko~u k…ôro~u ¶o~uwa ka…ô ¶a awa ko~u ra…¨~…ģiw. o~u mat…ôŇči…ĺaj a ra…¨~…ģiw to~u "mińßamńßamaj to~u …ĺafaŇč", "ka…¨~…ģo~ufańß" ńßananaj a k…ôro~u i, o~u nińßarat…ôŇčan ato~u nipaŇčaŇčan no~u aniniaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~ura. o~u ka…ĺa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ato~u ¶o~uwa ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ no~u k…ôro~u i, o~u ra…¨~…ģiw ko~ura saka…ô ¶a a …ĺa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ naira, o~u ra…¨~…ģiw i, iraaj to~u ko~u sakak…ôro~u nira a k…ôro~u. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw .
S.FORM: O sakero no 'Amis Sakero hananay no 'Amis ko kero, ira ko malikoda ato misalokiyaw hananay a kero. O malikoda hananay a kero i, o kero i kiloma'an anca o kero no fa'inayan. O misakoliyaw hananay a kero i, o kero to anohacowa sapikeroaw, kaacangan, pipakay'ifan, o piingkayan to malasofitay a fa'inayan; o kero no fafahiyan sanay ko roma a ngangan nira. Nga'ayay minanam a makero ko fafahiyan to kero no likoda, kaorira, cowa pinanam ko fa'inayan to kero no misakoliyway. O kero no 'Amis, ira ko kero cowa kaeca awa ko radiw. O matengilay a radiw to "mihamhamay to lafang", "kadofah" hananay a kero i, o niharatengan ato nipangangan no aniniay a tamdaw kora. O kalalecad ato cowa kalecad no kero i, o radiw kora sakaeca a lalecad naira, o radiw i, iraay to ko sakakero nira a kero. Pi'arawan to lakaw .
S.PHON: o~u sak…ôro~u no~u °amis sak…ôro~u ńßananaj no~u °amis ko~u k…ôro~u, ira ko~u ma…ĺiko~u…¨~…ģa ato~u misa…ĺo~ukijaw ńßananaj a k…ôro~u. o~u ma…ĺiko~u…¨~…ģa ńßananaj a k…ôro~u i, o~u k…ôro~u i ki…ĺo~uma °an an ¶a o~u k…ôro~u no~u fa °inajan. o~u misako~u…ĺijaw ńßananaj a k…ôro~u i, o~u k…ôro~u to~u ano~uńßa ¶o~uwa sapik…ôro~uaw, kaa ¶aŇčan, pipakaj °ifan, o~u piiŇčkajan to~u ma…ĺaso~ufitaj a fa °inajan; o~u k…ôro~u no~u fafańßijan sanaj ko~u ro~uma a ŇčaŇčan nira. Ňča °ajaj minanam a mak…ôro~u ko~u fafańßijan to~u k…ôro~u no~u …ĺiko~u…¨~…ģa, kao~urira, ¶o~uwa pinanam ko~u fa °inajan to~u k…ôro~u no~u misako~u…ĺijwaj. o~u k…ôro~u no~u °amis, ira ko~u k…ôro~u ¶o~uwa ka…ô ¶a awa ko~u ra…¨~…ģiw. o~u mat…ôŇči…ĺaj a ra…¨~…ģiw to~u "mińßamńßamaj to~u …ĺafaŇč", "ka…¨~…ģo~ufańß" ńßananaj a k…ôro~u i, o~u nińßarat…ôŇčan ato~u nipaŇčaŇčan no~u aniniaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~ura. o~u ka…ĺa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ato~u ¶o~uwa ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ no~u k…ôro~u i, o~u ra…¨~…ģiw ko~ura saka…ô ¶a a …ĺa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ naira, o~u ra…¨~…ģiw i, iraaj to~u ko~u sakak…ôro~u nira a k…ôro~u. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw .
